name: vars-localize

metadata.name: vars-localize
metadata.summary: Tool for creating localization with VARS.

documentation:
# vars-localize
Tool for creating localizations within the VARS database.

Author: Kevin Barnard ([kbarnard@mbari.org](mailto:kbarnard@mbari.org))

## :hammer: Installation

> [!NOTE]
> VARS Localize requires Python 3.8 or later.

To install VARS Localize, run:
```bash
pip install vars-localize
```

## :rocket: Usage

To start the application, run:
```bash
vars-localize [-u URL]
```

Once the application launches, log in with your VARS username and password.

Search for a concept in the bar at the top left of the application, then select a concept from the list of results to populate a tree of imaged moments in the pane below. 
Select an observation from the children in the subtree of the imaged moment, and draw a bounding box around the observed concept by clicking and dragging.

You can double-click on any localization to edit its properties in a dialog.
Additionally, a localization can be resized by dragging the square corners of its bounding box.

## Credits

VARS Localize is made with [PyQt6](https://pypi.org/project/PyQt6/).

---

Copyright © 2019 [Monterey Bay Aquarium Research Institute](https://www.mbari.org/)

modules.name: vars_localize.assets
documentation: Helpers for dealing with assets.

functions.name: vars_localize.assets.get_asset_path
documentation:
Get the absolute path to an asset.

Args:
    rel_path (Union[str, Path]): The relative path to the asset.

Returns:
    Path: The absolute path to the asset.

Raises:
    ValueError: If rel_path is an absolute path.

documentation: Utility functions for the application.

functions.name: vars_localize.util.utils.log
documentation:
Log a message to stdout
\:param message: Message to log
\:param level: Log level (see LOG_LEVELS)
\:return: None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.utils.n_split_hash
documentation:
Hashes string into n values using simple algorithm
\:param string: String to hash
\:param n: Number of values
\:param maxval: Bound
\:return: Tuple of int values

functions.name: vars_localize.util.utils.encode_form
documentation:
Encodes a JSON object to comply with the 'x-www-form-urlencoded' format
\:param json_obj: JSON object
\:return: URL encoded form string

functions.name: vars_localize.util.utils.extract_bounding_boxes
documentation:
Yield source bounding box objects from a JSON list of associations
\:param associations: JSON list of associations
\:param concept: Concept to attach to each source bounding box
\:param observation_uuid: Observation UUID to attach to box
\:return: Generator object for bounding boxes

documentation: Split a comma-separated list of values, stripping whitespace

Get data associated with an imaged moment uuid

Return a list of all concepts in the knowledge base

documentation:
Return a list of all concept parts

documentation:
Use the fast servlet to get a count of observations with valid image references

\:return: int number of observations with valid image references

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.jwt_auth
documentation:
Authenticate a session with basic JWT
\:return: Success or failure

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.create_observation
documentation:
Create an observation. One of timecode, elapsed_time, or recorded_timestamp is required as an index
\:param video_reference_uuid: Video reference UUID
\:param concept: Concept observed
\:param observer: Observer tag
\:param timecode: Optional timecode of observation
\:param elapsed_time_millis: Optional elapsed time of observation
\:param recorded_timestamp: Optional recorded timestamp of observation
\:return: HTTP response JSON if success, else None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.delete_observation
documentation:
Delete an observation in VARS
\:param observation_uuid: Observation UUID
\:return: HTTP response if success, else None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.create_box
documentation:
Creates an association for a box in VARS
\:param box_json: JSON of bounding box data
\:param observation_uuid: Observation UUID
\:param to_concept: Optional concept part
\:return: HTTP response JSON if success, else None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.modify_box
documentation:
Modifies a box with a given association_uuid
\:param box_json: JSON of bounding box data
\:param observation_uuid: Observation UUID
\:param association_uuid: UUID in associations table to modify
\:param retry: Retry after authentication failure
\:return: HTTP response JSON if success, else None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.delete_box
documentation:
Deletes a box with a given association_uuid
\:param association_uuid: UUID in associations table to delete
\:param retry: Retry after authentication failure
\:return: HTTP response if success, else None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.fetch_image
documentation:
Fetch an image from a URL and represent it as a pixmap
\:param url: URL of image
\:return: Pixmap item representing image if valid url, else None

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.get_all_users
documentation:
Get a list of all available VARS users

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.get_other_videos
documentation:
Get a list of all video references concurrent to the provided video reference UUID

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.rename_observation

Rename an observation

Get data for a particular video reference UUID

functions.name: vars_localize.util.m3.get_annotations_by_video_refernce

documentation:

\:type video_reference_uuid: str
\:return: JSON data if valid UUID, else None

Graphical bounding box representation

Create a box and add it to the manager
